summary: Patched the marketing loop so a direct measurement-hold run respects an already-active cooldown instead of resetting the hold window and creating more fake churn.
why_now: marketing_workflow_audit_latest.json says not to invent another reset while fresh external actions are still inside measurement windows
A direct measurement-hold execution path could restart the cooldown instead of following through
shared_findings_used: adoption_metrics_latest.json: Codeberg movement is the primary success gate
marketing_workflow_audit_latest.json: current windows are saturated and overlapping
market_intelligence_latest.json: shared findings artifacts should be reused, not sidelined
expected_outcome: Future direct measurement-hold runs record follow-through without extending the cooldown, reducing loop churn and preserving cleaner windows for real external marketing actions.
